text:
There once was a young girl named Lily. She loved dreams. Whenever she fell asleep, dreams would visit her. One night, though, a dream came with dark eyes. It told her secrets she didn.’t want to know. Lily woke up frightened. What kind of secret? Just then, her kitty entered sleepwalk. Just like a dream. Lily lay quiet.

Days turned into weeks. Even the stars seemed sleepy. Then one evening, under some big penses, the stars whispered secrets. They spoke gently. They told her not to fear. Even stars knew. So do I.

That’s when Lily knew. And dreams returned. She flew through landscapes she dreamed. Sometimes, she sat on tiny clouds. Sometimes, she walked alongside stars. But fear? That was something she chased.

Now Lily dreams of oceans, skies, and flowers. And when morning comes, she wakes feeling gentle. Even stars smile.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
